calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Of Jcd, Inc., Dba Jcd Marketing Against Hotel Nikko Of San Francisco, Inc., Dba Hotel Nikko Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JCD, INC., DBA JCD MARKETING's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award Of Jcd, Inc., Dba Jcd Marketing Against Hotel Nikko Of San Francisco, Inc., Dba Hotel Nikko Of San Francisco.

Petitioner's petition to confirm the arbitration award is granted. No substantive opposition filed. The court will execute the proposed amended judgment but strikes paragraph 3. (Proposed Judgment, 3:1-3.) The arbitration was limited to the room rate and the inclusion of paragraph 3 is unnecessary and could lead to confusion regarding the "relocation provision," an unripe issue. Petitioner to prepare a form of judgment consistent with this order and attach a copy of the arbitration award to that proposed judgment.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/DH)
